packageDirectories.versionDescription: Adds the AccessGraph Equity tab and a User-record-page panel showing GAEA-driven equity recommendations. The tab lists all users sorted worst-off-first by access utility to VIP nodes; selecting a row opens a disparity drill-down with the policy's suggested permission grants and Apply / Dismiss controls. Same recs surface on User Lightning Record Pages via the new agEquityUserPanel component (drop it in via App Builder).
